poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

instanceId.description: Stable identifier of the newly provisioned agent or runner instance.

instanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the instance.

imageReference.description: Image reference or version used to create the instance.

requestedBy.description: Service or actor that initiated provisioning.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this lifecycle event, such as Azure DevOps agent capabilities or GitHub runner labels.
